YUWANCARD-PIG_DOUBT_POWER.title: Pig Doubt
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_POWER.title: Rain Dark
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_POWER.description: Energy gained is doubled. Draw up to hand limit (10). Heal 6 HP after combat.
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_POWER.smartDescripti: Energy gained is doubled. Draw up to hand limit (10). Heal 6 HP after combat. Lasts for {Amount} turns.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY_POWER.title: Pig Bankruptcy
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY_POWER.descripti: All cards in hand cost 0 this turn, but they all have Exhaust.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY_POWER.smartDesc: All cards in hand cost 0 this turn, but they all have Exhaust.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BRAIN_OVERLOAD_POWER.title: Pig Brain Overload
YUWANCARD-PIG_BRAIN_OVERLOAD_POWER.descr: Every 2 turns, gain 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold]. Upgraded: every 3 turns.
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG_POWER.title: You Are Pig
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG_POWER.description: You have turned into a pig.
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG_POWER.smartDescrip: You are a pig. Lasts for {Duration} turns.
YUWANCARD-VAKUU_TAKEOVER_POWER.title: Vakuu Takeover
YUWANCARD-VAKUU_TAKEOVER_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, Vakuu will automatically play cards from your hand.
YUWANCARD-VAKUU_TAKEOVER_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of your turn, Vakuu will automatically play cards from your hand. Lasts for {Duration} turns.
YUWANCARD-TRAIN_YOU_WELL_POWER.title: Train You Well
YUWANCARD-PIG_CHARGE_POWER.title: Pig Charge Power
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRIENDS_POWER.title: Pig Friends
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRIENDS_POWER.description: When gained, summon a [gold]Pig Minion[/gold]. Every 3 stacks, the pig is upgraded.
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRIENDS_POWER.smartDescrip: When gained, summon a Pig Minion. Every 3 stacks, upgrade it.
YUWANCARD-PIG_MINION_POWER.title: Pig Minion
YUWANCARD-PIG_MINION_POWER.description: Absorb all unblocked attack damage meant for owner. When owner gains Block, gain {BonusBlock} Block. Pig's Strength is added to owner's attack damage. When owner gains Strength, pig gains 1 Strength.
YUWANCARD-PIG_MINION_POWER.smartDescript: Absorbs all unblocked attack damage for owner. Gains {BonusBlock} Block when owner gains Block. Strength added to owner's attacks. Gains 1 Strength when owner gains Strength.
YUWANCARD-PERFECT_THING_POWER.title: Perfect Thing
YUWANCARD-PERFECT_THING_POWER.descriptio: Gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] every certain number of cards you play. Upgraded: fewer cards.
